ModMetaData.name: FIP - Future-Tec
ModMetaData.author: Feil
ModMetaData.description: Applies Fallout-flavored rethemes to Vanilla Quests Expanded content — recasting ancient labs as Vault-Tec blacksite FEV programs, cryptoforges as pre-War mobile base crawlers, deadlife silos as military continuity bunkers, and generators with appropriate pre-War branding.
